entities.summary: User-facing API class for simple text generation

detail.name: LLM
detail.description: High-level interface wrapping LLMEngine. Handles tokenization, generation, and detokenization in one call.

takeaway.explain: Simplest possible interface for end users. Hides tokenization, batching, scheduling complexity. One method: generate(prompt) → text.
Single entry point wrapping multiple subsystems. User doesnt need to know about Engine, Scheduler, or ModelRunner.
takeaway.cross_lang: Java Spring @Service classes, Go handler structs, TypeScript service classes, Rust public module API
takeaway.gotcha: Facade can become a God Object if it accumulates too many responsibilities — split by domain
